Background-Charlatan — Female Human Fighter
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 14 (+2) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 16 (+3) Wisdom: 13 (+1) Charisma: 12 (+1)
Background: Charlatan Alignment: Chaotic Good Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 158/300 Level: 1 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes: Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +2
Feat Count: Fighting Style: 1; General: 0; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighter Primary Ability)
Feats: Archery; Savage Attacker Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Fighter Features: Armor Training (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Fighter Primary Ability; Fighting Style; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion; Perception, Survival); Strength; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Charlatan Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Dexterity, Constitution, Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Deception; Sleight Of Hand); Skilled; Tool Proficiency (Forgery Kit)
Feature Notes:
Fighter Primary Ability: 1 selection
Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +2 Insight: (wis) +1 Performance: (cha) +1
Animal Handling: (wis) +3 Intimidation: (cha) +1 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +3 Investigation: (int) +3 Religion: (int) +3
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +3 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +3 Perception: (wis) +1 Survival: (wis) +1
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Deception; Perception, Survival; Persuasion; Sleight Of Hand
Tool Proficiency: Forgery Kit: (dex)
Languages: Common; Elvish; Halfling
Skill Notes:
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Combat
Hit Points: 6 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 18
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Scale Mail Shield: Shield Weapons: Battleaxe (+3 1d8+1 S [2h d10]; Topple); Longsword (+3 1d8+1 S [2h d10]; Sap); Scimitar (+4 1d6+2 S; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+3 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Savage Attacker: Can take the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+1 hit points 2 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 3 chosen kinds of proficient weapons
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +1; Constitution: +2; Dexterity: +2; Intelligence: +3; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +1
